mapper.select:
SELECT id, org_id AS orgId, operation_type AS operationType, plan_id AS planId, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, operation_level AS operationLevel, affected_households AS affectedHouseholds, reason, remark, status, create_time AS createTime, create_id AS createId, update_time AS updateTime, update_id AS updateId FROM gs_cutoff_operation
deleted = 0
AND id = #{request.id}
ORDER BY update_time DESC
